com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct

Class PStructArray2D<T extends PStruct>

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray2D
      • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.arrays.struct.PStructArray2D<T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PStructArray2D<T extends PStruct>
extends AbstractNativeArray2D
    A fixed-shape 2D struct array over a single native allocation, addressed row-major.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PStructArray2D(NativeAllocator allocator, StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, StructLayout layout, long rows, long columns)
      Allocates a rows x columns grid on the given allocator, zeroed.
      PStructArray2D(StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory, StructLayout layout, long rows, long columns)
      Allocates a rows x columns grid on the system allocator, zeroed.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      T at(long row, long column)
      Creates a view of the cell at row, column.
      void clearStruct(long row, long column)
      Zeroes the cell at row, column.
      StructLayout layout() 

      • Methods inherited from class com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeArray2D

        clear, close, columns, isOpen, length, rows

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • PStructArray2D

        public PStructArray2D(StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                      StructLayout layout,
                      long rows,
                      long columns)
        Allocates a rows x columns grid on the system allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        viewFactory - creates the typed views
        layout - the struct layout
        rows - the row count
        columns - the column count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either dimension is negative

      • PStructArray2D

        public PStructArray2D(NativeAllocator allocator,
                      StructViewFactory<T> viewFactory,
                      StructLayout layout,
                      long rows,
                      long columns)
        Allocates a rows x columns grid on the given allocator, zeroed.
        Parameters:
        allocator - the allocator to source memory from
        viewFactory - creates the typed views
        layout - the struct layout
        rows - the row count
        columns - the column count
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if either dimension is negative

    • Method Detail

      • layout

        public StructLayout layout()
        Returns:
        the struct layout

      • at

        public T at(long row,
            long column)
        Creates a view of the cell at row, column.
        Parameters:
        row - the row index
        column - the column index
        Returns:
        a fresh view
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clearStruct

        public void clearStruct(long row,
                        long column)
        Zeroes the cell at row, column.
        Parameters:
        row - the row index
        column - the column index
        Throws:
        java.lang.IndexOutOfBoundsException - if either index is out of range
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed
